title: Flexible Frosty Demo
description: A short and icy GameBoy-style puzzle platformer featuring Frosty, a cute little penguin who can not jump like other penguins.

title: FLASK Demo
description: FLASK is a roguelike autobattler about alchemical greed on the new frontier. Build unstoppable homunculi, barter with mutated merchants, and slay hordes of monsters to harvest their valuable blood. It's time to get bloody... Bloody rich!

title: Gnat Pack Demo
description: A short incremental game about feeding a swarm of hungry gnats. Guide your bugs to the fruit, and unlock upgrades to grow your pack of buzzing buddies one bite at a time.

title: Farm Bang Demo
description: Raise living ammo, blast monsters, haul massive loot, and survive the debt collectors in this chaotic top-down farming shooter.

title: A Simple Square Demo
description: A Simple Square is a minimalist puzzle game where every move changes the level. Slide in straight lines, erase the tiles behind you, plan your path, and reach the exit without trapping yourself.

title: Loopstructor 2: Skyspine Demo
description: Build intricate rail networks, deploy and upgrade unique Battle Trains, and harness Turret Enchantments to forge mobile fortresses. Fend off endless abominations from the deep earth. Every layout is a battle of wits, every adjustment decides survival.

title: Next Star Demo
description: Idol Talent Show Simulation Game-Train from zero to idol debut! Rank high to stay in! Explore the map, manage your schedule and play mini-games.Face tough evaluations,compete with fellow trainees, and forge meaningful bonds. Your choices will unlock 10+ unique endings. Can you shine?

title: Speff Demo
description: Run, jump, and THINK your way through a series of grisly obstacles and diabolical puzzles. 20 Levels across 5 hubs with a range of hand drawn environments.

title: Emotional Labor Laboratory Demo
description: [Free Demo]Dive into virtual world and play emotions alongside your quirky, beautiful boss. A unique kind of 'Emotional Labor' begins, blending sweet chemistry with electrifying rhythm action.

title: ConOps21: Subversion Protocol – Book One: Black Signal Demo Slice
description: You are Cipher Reeve. The Dominion tried to erase you. The protocol failed. Enter the opening signal of ConOps21: Subversion Protocol — Book One: Black Signal, an interactive cinematic demo slice set in Neo-London. Memory is the terrain. Truth is contraband. Free.

title: The Rich Die First Demo
description: Build wealth, outsmart your rivals, and become the last millionaire standing in this multiplayer strategy card game. Play against friends or challenge AI opponents in a battle for financial dominance.

title: Von Neumann Project Demo
description: In this demo of Von Neumann Project you play as a self replicating probe as it charts the galaxies, peacefully, of course. Mine, build, expand, and explore in this sci-fi RTS. Remember to have as little impact on your surroundings as possible and protect yourself at all costs.

title: Bottled by Bears Demo
description: Join a family of bears and run the buzziest little honey farm! Collect and discover rare bees, bottle honey jars, expand your farm, and watch your flowery field bloom in this cozy idle management game.

title: FIGHTERIZER Demo
description: FIGHTERIZERA free-movement 3D fighting game set inside a globe-spanning illegal tournament where every hit counts, every angle matters, and every fighter brings their own way to win.This isn’t a traditional 2D lane fighter.

title: Guilty As Charged! Demo
description: Set in a dystopian world where even small crimes are punished in permanence, Guilty As Charged! sees 20-year-old Alan Pierce fight for victory in a televised gameshow between 18 criminals where the winner not only keeps their life, but gains a huge cash prize – as well as their freedom.

title: warp train Demo
description: Board a time-bending train and raid dangerous top-down extraction zones. Scavenge loot, smash buildings, reshape terrain, fight monster swarms, and escape before time runs out. Mix weapon affixes with magic stones to create your own explosive farming build.

title: 丢丢 Demo
description: 《丢丢》是一款可爱风格的自走棋，所有攻击方式均为把手里的物品丢出去，难度很轻松，失败了没惩罚还有奖励？

title: Stigmata Demo
description: Stigmata is a classic survival horror experience where you must fight, explore, and manage your resources to survive. A man finds himself alone in a city where reality is beginning to unfold. Step into the confession booth and face the one who watches. Does judgement await you or something else?

title: Prison Chain: The Unredeemed Thought Demo
description: Try the demo of Prison Chain: The Unredeemed Thought — a psychological suspense visual novel about sin and redemption. You wake up in an unfamiliar living room. Two silent men stand beside you. Every choice changes their "sin value" and leads to a different ending.

title: Castleborne Survivors Demo
description: A survivors-like game with side-scrolling action combat. Slash, dodge, and mow down endless monsters in a gothic horror castle. Upgrade with every choice, snowball out of control, and survive until the very end.

title: Rally King Demo
description: Rally King is a casino-themed ping pong roguelike where every rally puts the pot on the line. Play solo or with up to 3 friends. Hit chips, collect cards, roll dice, stack multipliers, and build broken paddle combos before one bad shot wipes it all.

title: Echoes of Memory Demo
description: Explore an abandoned mountain village, investigate mysterious audio tapes, and confront memories that contradict the truth. A dark psychological horror mystery in anime style.

title: Dice of Soul：刹那の裁定 Demo
落幕之前 Before the Fall Demo
description: 世纪交接的十年，港岛。一笔意外的投资让初出茅庐的剧作家姜韶平得以将首作搬上剧院舞台。这看似天降的机遇，却早已在暗中标好了筹码——渐行渐远的旧友、少时仰望的偶像、意外相识的神秘乐手、避而不见的至亲……谁能成为你的缪斯？谁又会将你推向深渊？亦或是，当掌声渐息，帷幕落下，还留在舞台上的，只有自己……

title: ai.ai Demo
description: The CEO of ai.ai has passed away, and his final word was "bubble." Uncover the meaning of his final word in this comedy mystery satirizing Silicon Valley. From the creator of the Jenkins webcomic.

title: Elude Demo
description: We took the weirdest yet most oddly-satisfying in-engine physics behaviours and made the best platformer experience we could.  Climb, evade or 'physics trick' your way through this deceptively simple coop platformer!

title: Figryne Cast Studio Engine Demo
description: An all-in-one VTuber streaming studio that tracks your VRM avatar in real time and takes you live. Its 3D-native engine brings cinematic post-FX and Axis 3D depth, and you can stream straight to YouTube, Twitch, and any RTMP-compatible service. No OBS needed. Buy once and use it forever.

title: Quasar Demo
description: Quasar is a "Bullet Hell Space Opera" with endless levels and upgrades for your ship. You'll fight against squadrons of enemy ships, even battling entire armadas, with bosses appearing occasionally during Survival mode.

title: Dracanea: The Ragtag Regalia PREVIEW Demo
description: Dracanea: The Ragtag Regalia is a comedy adventure game where Riker, an ex-teen hero, now lives life as a fully grown, slightly washed-up celebrity. Solve puzzles in the overworld to collect items, engage in turn-based battles with fighting-game button inputs, and even learn 150+ cooking recipes!

title: Seasonaut Demo
description: Explore a world divided among the four seasons, help its inhabitants, and solve the problems of each region. What begins as simple tasks soon transforms into a journey of discovery, mystery, and decisions that shape the future of this universe.

title: SkyMine Demo
description: Start digging, discover valuable resources, and uncover the secrets of surviving among the mines. This game combines strategy and creativity, offering an exciting experience.

title: PAGANS Demo
description: PAGANS is a dark-fantasy strategy card game inspired by Slavic mythology. Build a deck of gods, spirits, curses, and warriors, then fight short tactical PvE battles by controlling mystical locations and chaining powerful card synergies.

title: 字趣 Demo
description: 在文字宇宙中，公主被封印。请带她离开这里。多音字、同音字、平翘舌、反义字、成语、诗词，是你的成长技能。开动你的脑筋，走出这文字的迷宫！去解开所有的谜题吧！

title: Cascadium Demo
description: A simple idle game where you drop balls plinko-style to make money. Big number make head go brrrr.

title: Code RAPID Demo
description: Code RAPID is a Third-Person Action Mecha game with the focus on real-time high-mobility movement. Fight on the Ondarean front to uncover mysteries of a forgotten planet. Complete missions to earn weapons and parts to build a mech that truly suits your playstyle with deep customization systems.

title: Affictionate Demo
description: After a year of bad dates and failed job applications, you've nearly given up on the love story you've always written about. One night, you write your perfect man into a notebook... the next day, he becomes a reality. A romance visual novel about identity and the line between fiction and reality.

title: Rahasya:The unsolved mystery Demo
description: RAHASYA is a first-person horror mystery game where you investigate supernatural events, uncover hidden clues, and complete dangerous objectives.

title: Dark Workshop Simulator Demo
description: Dark Workshop is a first-person dark fantasy shop sim. Buy from shady suppliers, craft potions and weapons, set your prices, and sell to orcs, plague doctors, and mercenaries. World events reshape the market - read the signs, prepare during rumors, and profit when chaos hits.

title: Rifted Worlds Demo
description: A fast-paced Action-RPG that takes place on the floating remnants of destroyed worlds. Discover fragments of your lost world, place them onto the map, and explore! It's time to uncover the truth behind your world's destruction...

title: Accept or Reject Demo
description: Review hundreds of bizarre dating profiles, play mini-games, survive office drama, and try to romance your boss in this dating app management comedy.

title: Witch Hunt 0 Demo
description: "Witch Hunt 0" is a magic-focused, stage-based boss rush 3D action game. Take on the role of the witch Astera. To reclaim her lost powers, she must craft spells, tame defeated enemies as familiars, and conquer the formidable foes that stand in her way.

title: KOKO Dungeon Mania Demo
description: KOKO Dungeon Mania is a dungeon crawler adventure where you explore mysterious chambers, solve puzzles, battle monsters, and uncover the path forward. Each new level expands the dungeon with more chambers, tougher enemies, and greater challenges to overcome.

title: Stewart The Fox: Swing it! Demo
description: Master swinging, walljumps, and momentum based movement across 3 handcrafted maps. Improve your personal bests, race against ghosts, and experience a taste of the full game featuring 15+ maps, global leaderboards, clothing unlocks, and more.

title: Satanic Panic Demo
description: SATANIC PANIC is a fantastical strategy tower defense with heavy Roguelike elements. A war has broken out between Heaven and Hell, and Satan himself has entrusted you with a small army of chibi Biblically Accurate Demons to defend the layers of hell against an endless onslaught of Angelic assaults.

title: 程序员的刻板印象 Demo
description: For years, society has held many stereotypes about the programming profession. In this life simulation game, players can experience a programmer's journey from university to career development. Whether a programmer's life truly matches public perception can be discovered by trying it out.

title: Slime Simulator Demo
description: You need to obtain food to survive, and you can transform into the animals you hunt.

title: Boxing Bastards Demo
description: Plunge into a medieval world where knights brawl with their fists rather than swords! Get creative with physics-based combat as you fight through several thematic biomes full of unique enemies and encounters. Complete quests, buy upgrades, and kill baddies to become the ultimate Boxing Bastard!

title: Escape The Humans Demo
description: A quirky 2D puzzle-platformer where you’re a squishy alien on the run from humans. Outsmart traps, solve puzzles, and sneak your way to freedom.

title: Orb in the Deep Waters Demo
ZeroEco Demo
description: A psychological horror narrative game in pixel art about routine, memory, and the fear of change. Explore, interpret, and uncover what lies hidden within yourself.

title: Shine on Savior Demo
description: Shine on Savior takes place in 2009 in the city of New Delmarr. You play as Roy Rogers who leaves New Delmarr for work for a few months and comes back to see his city overrun with Dregs. Your mission is to save the city of New Delmarr from the Dregs and find the truth of what happened to your city.

title: Space Chickens Demo
description: In Space Chickens, you will Explore colorful miniature planets, breed unique chickens to complete your Chicken Codex, and upgrade your machines as you uncover secrets hidden across the galaxy.

title: Lily2D Demo
description: Demo version of Lily2D, a code-first 2D Game Engine Framework featuring fast iteration with Swamp scripting, shader-based rendering, and audio synthesis.

title: 六艺中文填字 Demo
description: 经典填字游戏的中文版。《六艺中文填字》是一款以中国古代“君子六艺”为核心框架的纯正中文文字解谜游戏。在这里，你可以穿梭于“礼、乐、射、御、书、数”六大主题卷宗，挑战包罗万象、纵贯古今中外的海量知识点。挑一个你最爱的四季国风视觉主题，静下心来，享受这场文字与文化的拼图之旅吧。

title: Tridan Demo
description: Push your luck in a fast-paced 3-card poker roguelite. Spin the wheel of fortune for powerful bonuses, risky drawbacks, and endless combinations as you chase your highest round.

title: Shipolis Demo
description: Shipolis is a cozy minimalist city builder and resource management game. Sail and explore archipelagos with your ship. Build cities and expand in several regions. Manage production lines and automate with trading routes. Will you build great wonders and uncover all the mysteries of this world?

title: Slots Up! Demo
description: A short, incremental game about rigging a slot machine to become a millionaire.

title: Area 75 Demo
description: Area 75 is a story-driven Horror TPS-Shooter where you experience the chaos unfolding in a secret military laboratory, where they experimented with dark matter, from Rick Gerrison's perspective. Rick is the only person who can use these special powers. Be part of this story!

title: Dungeon Infinite Demo
description: The demo is simply limited up to room 15, which gives you time to discover a lot of things. But it won't receive any feature updates. Have fun 😁

title: The Drifting Crown Demo
description: A world-building roguelite where every tile is a strategic choice. Forge paths, restore power, strengthen your character, and fight through a Victorian steampunk wasteland that changes with every run.

title: Guate Grand Prix Demo
description: Play the first chapter of Guate Grand Prix: a single-player arcade racing demo with customizable wooden toy trucks and tracks inspired by Guatemala, its streets, landscapes, traditions, and playful local identity.

title: We Grow Together Demo
description: Defend your starship in this endless sci-fi tower defense game! Form your ultimate squad of 2D heroes, permanently upgrade your spaceship's hull and defenses, and unleash powerful ultimate abilities to survive relentless waves of cosmic alien invaders in the vast void.

title: In Game Leader Demo
description: Become your teams In-Game Leader and lead your team of 5 agents to victory. Agents Each Agent has its owns stats and skills, so choose your team wisely. Get new agents by playing the game Utility Don't just run in. Be smart and use available utility like Grenades, Smokes, Flashbangs.

title: Sabre Hunter: Keep On Moving Demo
Grove of the Seven Stones Demo
Bio-Breaker Demo
description: Fight against over 25+ different types of enemies in my super epic top-down retro wave shooter; Bio-Breaker! Buy weapons to upgrade, active abilities and passive perks to survive against the hordes!

title: Blood & Chaos Demo
description: This demo includes the opening portion of the game, featuring the early areas, quests, and the first major dungeon.

title: Patience Balls Demo
description: Tilt interconnected boards with a single movement to guide rolling spheres through spatial challenges. Relax with protective walls in Zen Mode, or brave lethal edges and strict star times in the hardcore Patience Mode.

title: NEON SURGE Demo
description: A fast, neon twin-stick arena shooter: you aim, your ship auto-fires. Dash through bullets, hold off ever-bigger waves and pick roguelite upgrades each wave. 8 ships, 10 worlds, 7 modes.

title: Prismfall Demo
description: Prismfall is a strategic incremental game about defending your Prism from waves of enemies. Earn gold, wield powerful abilities, and buy upgrades from a deep and extensive upgrade tree.

title: Pizza Portale!! Demo
description: Pizza Portale is a first person horror game where you work as a portal delivery guy, delivering pizzas through portals. Your job is to keep delivering freshly baked pizzas via portals to destinations all across the country.

title: 竞拍之巅 Demo
description: In multiplayer auctions with incomplete information, uncover true value, manage your budget, and outbid opponents to become the true Bidding champion.

title: Touhou: Records of Wealth-Seeking Demo
description: Touhou: Records of Wealth-Seeking is a funny, chaotic visual novel and perfect for Touhou newcomers. No prior knowledge needed to enjoy it. Play as Keine, buy up Gensokyo’s assets, and face the invasion from the Outside World. You’ll meet all kinds of weirdos—and you’re one of them too.

title: The Grand Praetor Demo
description: As the seventh heir to the Empress, you have been appointed Grand Praetor to investigate a string of serial murders.Will you seek the truth and expose the conspiracy—or indulge in pleasure and power, doing as you please?

title: Wendtale Demo
description: A brilliant breakthrough in turn-based strategy! Attack to charge Echo, then spend Echo during the enemy's turn to unleash Countermeasures—Preemptive Strike, Defense, or Counterattack. Anticipate enemy targeting, manage your resources, and take them out by surprise between turns!

title: onRails Demo
description: Try onRails. Run it on-track. SimReader connects to your sim automatically, the overlay runs on top without alt-tabbing, and both work in full. Limited access to both setup modules included.

title: Little King Unchained Demo
description: Little King Unchained is a demanding precision platformer set in a dark fantasy world. Master tight movement, survive deadly traps, and climb through a cursed kingdom in solo play. Multiple difficulty modes, hidden challenges, and unforgiving gameplay await.

title: SHARDS Demo
description: An asymmetric co-op horror puzzle for 2–4 (best as a duo). One works the board, the rest hold the rules — you never see each other's screen, only your voices connect. The symbols you must describe have no names. Convey them before the caged core collapses. Miscommunication is fatal.

title: Catopia Demo
description: A desktop pet sim where a pixel cat lives on your wallpaper while you work. Choose one of five cats — Cheese, Cloud, Pumpkin, Cotton, or Oreo. Feed, play, wash, and pet to build affection. Neglect its health and it falls ill; neglect its heart and it walks away for good.

title: Cartridge Carnage Demo
description: Loot, shoot, repeat. A mashup of rogue-like bullet heaven gameplay, mixed in with retro style top down dungeon crawler mechanics, and a dash of crude violence and humor.

title: DüRT: Motocross Championship Demo
description: [h1]DüRT: Motocross Championship - DEMO[/h1]This is a free taste of DüRT: Motocross Championship — arcade motocross built around riding skill, mid-air control, and high-speed dirt-track manoeuvres, dressed in a late-'90s / early-2000s PSX look. Tight controls, two-stroke scream, and pure dirt. No fluff. Just ride.Like what you play?

title: PROJECT: Melee Only Demo
description: Play as an Android and fight your way to the highest Stage possible. Keep your level and your EXP and start again stronger. Reveal the secret of your purpose and the memories of your past life.

title: ARIDA 2: Rise of the Brave Demo
description: Explore the 19th-century Brazilian backlands and use crafting to fight hunger, thirst, and drought. Follow Cícera on this journey of connections, toward a legendary village that will change history.

title: Trait Demo
description: The swipe roguelite. Trait puts two powers on every card and one choice in your hands: left or right. Build devastating decks, fight through shifting encounters, and learn that in this game, hesitation hits harder than any monster.

title: Big Market Simulator Demo
description: Manage your own supermarket! Order products, stock shelves, serve customers, and grow your business in Big Market Simulator Demo.

title: Hold The Line Demo
description: The power core is failing. You are humanity's last line of defense. Hold the line in this brutal 4-player co-op zombie survival FPS. Reinforce barricades, upgrade your arsenal, and fight through increasingly deadly waves of zombies alone or with friends. How long can you hold the line?

title: apochess Demo
description: Apochess is a progressive chess MMO game. Long-term progression. no p2w at all = no purchase available. Very well balanced Chess RPG.

title: It's cooked Demo
description: Cook burgers, avoid obstacles, check the time - Simple as that.

title: Gem Party Demo
description: Match 3 or more gems to channel their power into your cute animal party. Defeat the endless bosses charging toward you.

title: Val'ty Demo
description: Assert dominance in this Retro Reptilian oriented First Person Shooter. No humans allowed! GET VAL'TED!

title: 和躲在酒馆里的黑色JK一起喝咖啡 Demo
description: 在一天风平浪静的日子，一个名叫洛小米的少女突然闯入到了主角的生活当中，她自称从未来而来，并为了拯救未来已经死亡的男主 起初，男主还以为这是句玩笑话，可在通过自己的能力读心之后，才发现她似乎并没有说谎 这次我的好奇心作祟之下，他和这位神秘少女进行了同居，并开始了每天的工作日常

title: Chucho Demo
description: Gay romance and demon slaying, the perfect recipe!!

title: Ghost Exorcist Demo
description: This is the demo version of Ghost Exorcist.Experience the core gameplay loop by playing through the entirety of Stage 1. Purify ghosts, collect souls, strengthen your abilities, and grow into a powerful exorcist.

title: Alchemist Business Simulation Demo
description: Forget cozy shops. In Alchemist Business Simulation, you manage volatile recipes, volatile markets, and deadly cave expeditions. Master precise alchemy, exploit trends, and build your empire before your lab explodes. The cauldron always wins. Prove you can control the chaos. Download now.

title: Cursor Flux Demo
description: Add motion blur, trails, and glow effects to your cursor for a smoother, more stylish pointer that fits your setup without changing your workflow.

title: CUEQUENCE Demo
description: Try the demo of CUEQUENCE, a single-player roguelite billiards card battler set in Q-LAND. Aim with precision, build your deck, use magical cards, and face increasingly challenging opponents across three playable sections.

title: Agricola - The King's Farmer Demo
description: Demo zu Agricola.

title: Paint Gal Adventures Demo
description: A vibrant 3D platformer adventure where you explore colorful worlds, solve creative challenges, and uncover the magic hidden in each beautifully crafted level. Perfect for players seeking wholesome, charming gameplay.

title: Skeptikos Demo
description: Skeptikos is a solo game taking place in a strange formation center. Resolve the puzzles, find the secrets around here.

title: Pinguino Demo
description: Slip & Slide Your Way Through Each Level While Eating as Few Fish as Possible!

title: DAWN CAR Demo
description: “Pixel art” is too soft a word! This is the story of the Pre-Pixel Age… A dazzling world built entirely from 8×8 character graphics— the vibrant construction set of a Digital Tangram World.

title: Copter Dude Demo
description: Short one level demo of the Copter Dude game. This level is not in the full game and its purpose is to show the main action and to put a funny start  to the story - find and save the dude's wife. The game is 2D action arcade. You fly a copter with just a hook - every crash is fatal.

title: All But Weak Demo
description: All But Weak is a Couch Coop Roguelite for 1 to 4 players. Mix elements, stack crazy weapon modifiers, and try to survive the madness with your friends.

title: Neo Tokyo Rush Demo
description: Neo Tokyo Rush is a Synthwave retro arcade racer set in a neon-drenched future Tokyo. Hit the gas, own the streets, and prove you're the king of the neon underground.

title: The Hidden Library Demo
description: Uncover secrets in this dark academia-inspired 2D point-and-click adventure. Solve puzzles, explore atmospheric locations, and engage in immersive mini-games as you piece together the mystery of a hidden library filled with forbidden Soviet-era books

title: BetWUni Demo
description: BetWUni is a strategic deckbuilding game inspired by casino mechanics and cosmic mysticism. Build powerful card combinations based on the Five Elements and Zodiac Signs to score massive points and defeat the Cursed Chips.

title: Lost in the Fest Demo
description: Download the new demo, a small taste of what the final game will be like. Without the story and side quests, you can focus on discovering the battles, items, and minigames. The purpose of this demo is to gather feedback to make the final version as fun as possible.

title: powerless Demo
description: Powerless Demo is a game that blends RPG elements and mini-games. You play as a teacher guiding a robot on an important mission, solving puzzles, and uncovering the mysteries of the world.

title: 仙门守护者 Demo
description: Immortal Sect Guardian is a 2D xianxia tower defense game where you command sect disciples to defend your mountain gate against waves of demons. Build, upgrade, and combine disciples with passive artifacts to face monsters. The demo includes the first four stages of the first map.

title: Night On Demo
description: RPG game of explore a video game arcade called Game On, a place filled with arcades and video game rooms where a boss who rules the place wants to destroy everything, except you... Can you save Game On?

title: Finish The Dishes! Demo
description: Get a taste of Finish The Dishes! in this fast-paced arcade shooter demo. Blast kitchen pests, expose their weaknesses, upgrade your arsenal, and chase five-star runs across three stages.

title: Sofia in Exchange for Lies Demo
I Am the Demon King: Stop Sun Wukong Demo
description: A reverse Journey to the West roguelite — play as the Demon King, stop Sun Wukong. Draft monsters, place 24 magic traps, and defend your Demon Throne across 10 escalating stages.

title: Monitor Demo
description: You wake up alone in a surveillance room. As flickering screens come online, hidden spaces and clues appear. Unlock monitors, observe every feed, and piece together the truth behind your identity.

title: Im Gonna Be Evil Demo
description: She knows exactly what she wants and the world has never dared deny her. After all, she is the modern daughter of the goddess of love. Lady Elisse is unrelenting enough to achieve anything so long as she wills it. And being Cupid’s apprentice is not on the list. Still, in the grand scheme of things, defiance may cost more than obedience.

title: Bounce Arena Simulator Demo
description: Bounce War Simulator is an auto-battle arena built for streamers! 12 bouncing physics-based weapons clash in customizable personal/team matches. Let viewers predict winners via Discord integration to top the leaderboard, or trigger chaotic events like Meteors and Black Holes via Stream Deck!

title: 仙途放置：无尽天梯和完美装备 Demo
description: 欢迎大家体验，个人独立游戏，大家能接受一个什么样的价格。尽量低价。在无尽天梯中斩妖除魔，集齐九转道果，最终飞升成仙！ 【游戏简介】 《仙途放置》是一款修仙题材的放置RPG。你将扮演一名初入仙途的修士，通过挑战无尽天梯、收集神兵利器、逐步突破境界，九转成仙！

title: Team Rush Demo
description: Team Rush is a fast-paced multiplayer beat-'em-up built around fluid movement, creative combos, and high-energy battles. In this beat-'em-up choose from a diverse cast of fighters, each with their own unique abilities, special attacks, and playstyles.

title: No Exit : Anomaly Demo
description: A single-player psychological survival horror. At the end of an ordinary day, a routine subway ride leads you into a bizarre, endless alternate reality. Survive against overwhelming dread and surreal creatures by utilizing your surroundings.

title: Re.DiligentMinoriko ~Sister's Trial~ Demo
description: Tosa Laboratory's very first title returns as a full remake! Smash your enemies with farming tools! Send them flying with vegetables! Experience Minoriko Aki's powerful 2D action adventure, completely renewed!!

title: 记忆收藏家 · The Memory Mender Demo
description: In the Memory Mender — a house between reality and forgetting — you repair broken memories. Piece together faded photographs, pull buried voices from the rain, and help people say the goodbyes they never got to say. No fail states, no time pressure — just gentle rituals of letting go.

title: Peristeria Demo
description: An atmospheric 3D metroidvania with heavy emphasis on platforming and exploration. Use projectiles, grappling, and dash to discover hidden ruins and secrets beneath the surface.

title: Last Resort Demo
description: After inheriting your grandfather’s abandoned motel in the middle of nowhere, you’re forced to start over among strange guests, buried secrets, and a growing curse that refuses to stay hidden.

title: The Crystal Atelier Demo
description: Try a cozy crafting RPG about restoring rough gems by hand, fulfilling guild requests, and growing a humble workshop into a rising atelier. This demo includes the opening stretch of The Crystal Atelier through the end of Act 1.

title: Who Murdered My Empress? Demo
description: “Who Murdered My Empress?” is a time-travel romance visual novel set in a fantastical realm inspired by 19th century Vietnam. Assume the role of an Empress with a lavish harem of captivating men as you navigate intrigue, love, and mystery.

title: My Wukong Demo
description: A desktop pet with a transparent background that displays chibi animations based on the player's keyboard and mouse actions. Players can choose different pet appearances and accessories, or use drawing tools for custom adjustments.

title: galaksia online Demo
description: Experience 2 hours of unrestricted gameplay in Galaksia Online, a massive multiplayer sci-fi MMORPG! Command your ship, engage in epic PvP & PvE battles, craft gear, and build clans. Purchase the full game to seamlessly carry over your progress and continue your endless space adventure!

title: Sparrow Country Demo
description: A limiting version of the full game.

title: 1997 Reloaded Demo
description: A free 15-minute taste of 1997 RELOADED. Dive into an alternate 90s analog mystery, test the vintage answering machine mechanics, and feel the pulse of the Roxyverse before the first major cliffhanger hits.

title: Lovu Lovu Pizza Pig Demo
description: Deliver your lust-inducing pizza creations to love-hungry sexy beauties, Pizza Pig! Hot platforming action guaranteed, but watch your step! One wrong jump and your dreams of delicious pizza love will fall into the depths right along with you...

title: Polychoron Explorer Demo
description: Tired of 2D and 3D games? Check out this puzzle game and sandbox for people curious about Euclidean 4D space. Solve Magic Manycell puzzle inspired by Magic Cube. Explore all 6 known regular polychorons (4D figures made of 3D bodies for faces), or create your own.

title: Dungeons & Dummies Demo
description: Descend alone or drag up to 7 friends into a deep, ever-changing dungeon that does not care about your feelings. Chase loot, quests, and power while insisting “one more floor” is a great idea. Greed is encouraged. Survival is optional.

title: No Beer Left Behind! Demo
description: 2D sokoban puzzle game with pixel art and an 8-bit soundtrack. You play as a dwarf tidying up his cellars. The goal is simple: get every barrel onto its marked spot, and the level is solved.

title: Labyrinth of Doom Demo
description: A dark fantasy dungeon crawler. Fight, scavenge, and outwit a friend or AI rival in procedurally generated labyrinths — Battle Royale for two, with the full game unlocking up to 10 players, Legendary Artifacts, and Co-op mode.

title: Magic Never Stops! Demo
description: A short incremental game about using magic to kill enemies, collect souls, and grow your magical powers.

title: Braveforce: The Lost Dominion of the Void Demo
Cytokine Storm Demo
description: Cytokine Storm is a retro survival horror set inside a coma patient's body. Battle parasites, viruses, and a defective immune system to wake yourself up. Explore a surreal biological world where you must use your wits, weapons, and unique costumes to survive grotesque locations and puzzles.

title: LAST RITE TD Demo
description: Command humanity’s last defenses in a cinematic sci-fi tower defense demo. Build towers, deploy soldiers, choose your nation, and fight back against VAELRA’s hostile AI forces in the first mission of LAST RITE TD.

title: The Pawn Broker Demo
description: The Pawn Broker is an economic survival and atmospheric horror game. Wake up behind the counter of a cursed pawn shop. Inspect every item, spot the signs, survive the consequences of your choices, and stay profitable. This Demo includes access to two complete weeks.

title: The King Got Too Much Gold Demo
description: Your royal fountain spits out more gold than anyone could ever spend, and cleaning it up is somehow your job. Sweep coins, sell them, draft upgrades, hire goblins, trolls and a cat, unlock a big web of skills, then feed your whole fortune to the Glutton King. You can never lose. The gold never stops

title: Tech Resale Simulator Demo
description: Run your own second-hand electronics store. Freely arrange shelves & goods. Earn money, expand, upgrade, and buy rarer mystery crates to unlock even rarer items. Experience real shop management. Find bargains at the second-hand market — but you might also lose it all.

title: DAY BREAKER : Awakening Code Demo
description: DAY BREAKER is Action third-person shooters game, play as Mia a resistance scout arriving on a remote island after a sudden blackout. Armed with only a pistol and grenades, you explore and reach a mountain safe house. you discover a fallen scout, hinting at a deeper and hidden threat.

title: Cow Heard Demo
description: Welcome to the Cow Heard Demo! This demo introduces players to the atmosphere, setting, and core mechanics of Cow Heard. You will experience the beginning section of the story, explore part of the farm environment, and encounter early puzzles and narrative elements that establish the tone of the full game!

title: BAND MATES Demo
description: Band Mates is Rock Band meets Garage Band. Create your band. Create your music. Grab your friends. Be awesome together.

title: Vision Quest: A New Ascent Demo
description: Vision Quest: A New Ascent is a challenging twin-stick action-adventure shaped by nature. Survive 2-hit death combat with well-timed critical hits to restore your Health and rise above failure with a generous respawn system. The summit is waiting.

title: Rain Station Z Demo
description: Multiplayer Open World Zombie Survival

title: Fantasy Air-Sea Battles Showdown Demo
description: *Fantasy Air-Sea Battles Showdown* is a fast-paced top-down air-sea shooter. Pilot fantasy aircraft, dodge missiles, lock on to enemies, unleash firepower, call in allies, and unlock new planes as you battle across oceans, islands, and intense battlefields.

title: Turnbuckle Hearts Demo
description: Turnbuckle Hearts is a visual novel set in the world of professional wrestling. Forge friendships, find romance, and fight for your future as your choices shape the story.

title: Cube Fold Demo
description: Cube Fold is a relaxing minimalist puzzle game where every move unfolds the cube into new shapes. Solve handcrafted levels filled with teleporters, jump tiles, moving platforms, bridges, and clever mechanics. Easy to learn, challenging to master.

title: Teckel Adventure Demo
description: Teckel Adventure is a charming 2D platformer: play as Luna, a little dachshund on a quest to recover her stolen ball across forests and villages. Jump, dodge enemies and collect tokens in a fair, accessible adventure. This demo covers the first 3 levels.

title: Jigsaw Puzzle Demo
description: Your digital version of this beloved classic game, designed for ease of use. Connect up to 4 mouse devices for a local multiplayer fun. Full version will store 100+ puzzles, each with 4 save game slots. Use your own images.

title: Secret Dice Demo
description: Combine dice and items to create powerful synergies and unique builds. Secret Dice is a roguelike strategy game where every run plays out differently. Roll, combine, and stack your score as you push for new heights.It's not just luck. The choices you make — which dice to pick, which items to use — determine the outcome.

title: Love Potions Suck: A Text Romance Demo
description: Love Potion Sucks is a text-based choice game about heartbreak, jealousy, and magic gone wrong. Make decisions as Rayne navigates school drama, awkward crushes, and a spellbook that promises love at a dangerous cost.

title: Spell Circle Mage Demo
description: Spell Circle Mage is a 2D adventure game that combines action, puzzle, and roguelite elements. Players control the mage Elana, placing spell circles to unleash magic and defeat enemies!

title: Caroline's Underworld Demo
description: Navigate through a weird and whimsical underworld, meet interesting creatures and undead spirits, and solve puzzles to uncover the reason you’ve been sent here. Caroline’s Underworld is a 2D puzzle RPG that is inspired by the story of Alice in Wonderland, and is set in a fantastical version of hell.

title: Petko and the Black Island Demo
Eden's Eclipse Demo
description: The third installment in the Eden series A 2D bullet-hell vertical-scrolling shump with a feel reminiscent of arcade games from the 1990s to the 2000s.

title: Legion of Judgment: Fallen Angel Demo
description: Legion of Judgment is a Noir action-RPG Metroidvania game that offers a new and deeper player experience. Explore forgotten memories to become stronger, manage a hotel in reality to create a powerful legion and win the war against werewolf guild.

title: Nanma, A Tecelã das Sombras Demo
description: Nanma: A Tecelã das Sombras is a Brazilian dark high-fantasy visual novel where the loom of fate is in your hands. Take on the role of Nanma and discover whether your powers are a gift or a curse.

title: Booya! Demo
description: Collect the letters B-O-O-Y-A to win. Booya is a chaotic party card game of stealing, bluffing, redirecting, and sabotaging your friends before they spell the word first.

title: KON-PON SHMUP -Shapeshifter Showdown- Demo
description: A bullet hell shooting game with an outstanding sense of exhilaration. Dodge a variety of enemy attacks and aim to defeat the enemies! The enemies are cute fox girls. The player character is a tanuki girl (Sodeko). There are dialogue scenes before and after battles.

title: Contrabandism Simulator Demo
description: Contrabandism Simulator is a dark, atmospheric trading simulation set in a harbor that comes alive at night. Buy, sell, negotiate, take risks, and survive each night on your own.

title: BRINE Demo
description: Something smells fishy in Cornwall. A mutated, violent uprising of local seafood has surged from the depths, claiming the coast for themselves. At the centre stands a disgruntled fisherman. Fight through quintessentially Cornish environments in retro FPS flair. Half the res, double the fun!

title: WBS26 Demo
description: WBS26 is a wrestling promotion management simulator where you control shows, rosters, contracts, titles, finances, and backstage drama. Build stars, create rivalries, survive crises, and shape the future of your promotion. #BookItBetter

title: 涂涂卡牌 Demo
description: Blend RGB cards on grids for unique damage; split and recombine stickers to craft crazy cards — burst clear or negative energy tricks, endless builds.

title: Stronghold 4 Demo
description: YOUR STRONGHOLD AWAITSFeel the impact of a living medieval world on your castle economy and siegecraft, as you battle against hostile outlaws, rival lords and the elements themselves in this new narrative RTS set years before the events of the original Stronghold!

title: Deskdragora Demo
description: Deskdragora is a virtual pet game that lives in the corner of your desktop. While you work, study, or browse the internet, your little magical mandragora grows, produces magic, and keeps you company throughout the day.

title: Spellfall: Last Mage Standing Demo
description: Spellfall: Last Mage Standing is a fast paced top-down arena brawler where 6 mages draft spells and items across 5 rounds and battle to be the last mage standing. This demo allows players to experience Spellfall's core arena combat in practice matches vs. bot opponents.

title: Destined Notes : The Written Fate Demo
description: A massacre. A past that won’t stay buried. As Daniel, dive into a chilling investigation that spirals into pure horror. Explore, solve, survive—but something is watching. The deeper you go, the lesser you escape.

title: Ape-tite Demo
description: Cook through the chaos in an ape‑paced local co‑op kitchen where space is tight and pressure is constant.

title: Big Breakfast 2 Demo
description: Play the demo of Big Breakfast 2, featuring the first two dungeons of the game! Play through the first steps of the critically acclaimed turn-based RPG, Big Breakfast 2Save data from the demo transfers to the final release, so you can pick up where you left off! In a world without Breakfast, one man decides to challenge fate!

title: Spin Cycle Demo
description: A roguelite strategy game where you keep the books for the criminal underworld. Take contracts from cartels and sanctioned regimes, route money through 20+ jurisdictions, play the market of sanctioned coins. And don't poke Interpol.

title: Foedus - Rise of the Allies Demo
description: Experience the tactical combat of Foedus: Rise of the Allies in this combat-focused demo. Lead your heroes through a dangerous battlefield, face deadly enemies, and discover a glimpse of the world of Foedus.

title: Infinite Arcana Demo
description: Play the free Demo of Infinite Arcana: the first 60 nodes, 5 regions, arcane slot-relic combat, stone builds, shops, rests, altars, witches, and risky route choices.

title: Comfort Food: A Taste of Courage Demo
description: Comfort Food: A Taste of Courage is a fast-paced, action-packed cooking game. Roast, fry, and sizzle a variety of dishes to complete orders and earn money before rent is due! Embark on this culinary quest of courage as Teal reheats her passion for cooking again!

title: Deep Space Survivor: Endless Starfield Demo
description: "Deep Space Survivor: Endless Starfield" is a survivor-style game. Your interstellar battleship accidentally enters an unknown universe, fighting its way through endless enemies, roaming multiple star systems, and collecting meteor resources to forge your ultimate orbital weapon.

title: Chop Loop Demo
description: A 3D incremental lumberjack game where every tree changes the way you play. Unlock unique tree mechanics, control which trees appear with runes and upgrade beavers to automate your harvest.

title: EvoluCell Demo
description: Free demo—Chapter 1 only (~20–30 min). Shoot, devour, inflammation storm. 3 gene shops, boss Pulseroid. Morphs & more chapters coming. Wishlist EvoluCell!

title: 宽恕我（Show me mercy） Demo
description: SHOWMEMERCY is mystery otomegame. Play as Lilith, a widowedduchess who must eliminate those threaten herself or others. Choose method, plan thecrime. Every decision leads to different outcome. Build relationships with characters— stepson, priest, sheriff,and apothecary. Trust them, or deceive them

title: One Billion Ducks Demo
description: An incremental journey about duck hunting with your canine companions. Shoot rare ducks, sell them, upgrade your abilities, and collect one billion ducks to combat world hunger!

title: Amnesia Bullet Demo
description: A demo for Amnesia Bullet, a TPS shooter with gyro aiming support. Play the opening story, tutorial, and the first Memory stage.

title: Phemx Demo
description: Phemx is a simple but increasingly challenging retro-style arcade game. Use your paddle to bounce the balls to safety and get a big score!

title: Jack Pottwin: House of Odds Demo
description: Fight your way up a casino tower to wake from a fever dream in this Roguelike Deckbuilder. Craft your deck, modify runs with lucky coins, and control the Odds. Fuse cards to build high value attacks, trigger poker combos to add powerful combat traits to your cards.

title: Oro Cade Demo
description: Master ORO CADE, a relaxing 3D logic puzzler. Target color groups to clear the board, but don’t break the chain or blocks will reappear! Demo contains 10 of 70 handcrafted levels, 3 modes of difficulty and a dynamic soundtrack.

title: Arma: Cold War Assault Remastered Demo
description: A genre-defining classic, rebuilt. Arma: Cold War Assault Remastered Demo brings the 2001 original's engine to modern 64-bit Windows & Linux. Free, open-source, and doubling as an official asset pack for your own Arma missions and mods.

title: High On Life 2 Demo
description: Uncover part of the intergalactic conspiracy threatening the galaxy in this FREE demo for High On Life 2! Use your alien arsenal of talking guns to save your outlaw sister and reveal the dark secret deep within the bowels of an extraterrestrial zoo...

title: Astaryn: RPG Idler Demo
description: Try the early-game slice of Astaryn: RPG Idler. Pick a class, train professions, craft supplies, grow your hero, and begin a slow-burn idle fantasy campaign with offline progress and preparation-based combat.

title: Liminal Backrooms Demo
description: A co-op horror game for up to 4 players where you explore Backrooms-inspired levels, solve puzzles, find exits, and survive entities with different rules. *Limited levels.

title: Sun Catcher Demo
description: Restore damaged stained glass art and immerse yourself in a charming story about lost memories and community in Sun Catcher, a cozy paint-by-numbers tale.

title: Unstable Nuclear Reactor Demo
description: An incremental hex-puzzle roguelite game where merging atomic elements prevents a nuclear meltdown.

title: Dungebra Demo
description: Dungebra is a dark fantasy roguelike deckbuilder where you choose multiple cards at once, trigger Combo, Overload and Sequence, build your deck during the run, and turn every turn into an explosive play.

title: Flagship Down Demo
description: Tactical roguelike auto-battler. Assemble your fleet and equip your flagship with modules and weapons. Recruit and assign crew members to your ships. Start the round and watch your strategy unfold in fully automated battles.

title: Carmilla : Crimson Moon Demo
description: A dark yuri horror visual novel inspired by a classic gothic novella. When the enigmatic Carmilla arrives, Laura is swept into a fever dream of obsession. Is this stranger the cure for her loneliness or a herald of corruption? And what caused the mysterious deaths of two girls in the nearby village?

title: Синеморск oil inclusive Demo
description: A visual novel about an environmental disaster. Coordinate volunteers, make difficult decisions, and try to survive as you try to save a coastal town dying from an oil spill.

title: Qumino Demo
description: Qumino is a cozy roguelike domino game. There are different heroes with unique abilities that make every deck playthrough different. Build your deck with different domino tiles and think about what you need for the run.

title: Blood Moon: Last Stand Demo
description: Blood Moon is an action strategy roguelike set in a dark fantasy cultivation world. Explore the map by day, gather equipment and resources, and defend against demonic hordes by night. The demo features 2 heroes, diverse builds, and challenging boss battles.

title: Babel Legacy Demo
description: An idle game where you gather resources and grow your city. Sit back and watch your city expand!

title: Yuntai Demo
description: Yuntai is a story-driven horror game, where Veris travels to Yuntai City for the Qiqiao Festival after a friend's invitation, but ends up uncover a sinister cult and a series of eerie supernatural events.

title: 遥かなる円形世界 Demo
description: The sequel to “Return to Shironagasu Island.” Two stories unfold simultaneously, occasionally intersecting. Advance both stories to avert a major crisis!

title: The Velvet Green Witch : A Quiet Life Demo
description: A quiet survival RPG about living with a witch in a secluded forest. Gather herbs, hunt for food, and craft potions to sustain your life. Experience the early part of the game in this demo.

title: Anaa 15 Boss Challenge Demo
description: Anaa: 15 Boss Challenge is a 3D action boss-fighting game focused on dodging, slashing, upgrading your character, and surviving intense battles against powerful bosses.

title: Select Eleven Demo
description: Pick the squad. Win the series. Lift the trophy.Cricket Manager puts you in the head coach's chair of an international cricket team. Every call-up, every team sheet, every field change is yours. Build a side that can win at home and abroad and carry a nation's hopes into every match.

title: Theseus' Cycle Demo
description: A dark sci-fi 2D action and factory automation game. Defeat alien monstrosities with high-speed parries to harvest their mechanical flesh. Use these spoils to build and upgrade an automated bio-energy factory. Generate power to unlock new territories and fuel your progression.

title: The Last Market Demo
description: The Last Market is an open-world game set in a post-apocalyptic world where you build a safe zone for survivors and defend it against zombies. It combines survival content with a simulation of managing. Fight zombies, collect sellable items, and grow your safe zone and market by selling them.

title: Please Do Not Call It a Trash Game Streamer: ㅎHㅍㅍY ㄴLㄴL루
description: [Please Do Not Call It a Trash Game Streamer] is a reverse-progression 2D platformer. Guide the cute bakery girl Nanaru through devil Yako's trials. As you advance, you lose abilities and controls deteriorate—a trap set by someone wishing the adventure never ends.

title: Final Deal Demo
description: A dark comedy card roguelite set inside Blood & Spades, an underground club where sarcastic skeletons, dangerous card games, and terrible decisions somehow became a community. Build absurd combos, survive toxic rules, and try not to disappoint the audience of the dead.

title: Road Connect Demo
description: Road Connect is a casual puzzle game inspired by the classic 15 Puzzle, where you must rearrange tiles to build a functional road.

title: Asteroid Extractors Demo
description: Mine, upgrade and survive in deep space. Extract valuable resources from procedurally generated asteroids and turn a tiny operation into a massive extraction.

title: Midnight Noodle Demo
description: Play the DEMO of Midnight Noodle! Experience the gripping beginning of Ogik's journey: coming home from work to his parents fighting violently, taking refuge to chill and chat with a friend in the quiet night, and then upon his return... where did his parents go?!! Play the DEMO and Wishlist NOW!

title: Diamond Island Demo
description: Dive into the thrilling world of our First Person Shooter Game, where survival is your only mission. Navigate through intense environments as you hunt for hidden diamonds, each one a step closer to victory

title: Antarctic Showdown 남극결투 Demo
description: Antarctic Showdown is a 1v1 shooting roguelite where you build and strengthen yourself with every defeat. Kill your friend and claim victory!

title: Oath for Glory Demo
description: Join the tournament as a lowly knight of a small village. A skill-based boss fighting game built around directional combat. Learn, adapt, and master precise melee mechanics where player skill determines victory.

title: Broken Soccer Demo
description: The demo of the most absurd soccer game ever created! Try to win the preparatory cup with aliens, cavemen, hippies, seniors, ultras, and vikings while waiting for the full version.

title: Cobot-Man Adventure Demo
description: Cobot-Man Adventure is an action shooter game against evil robots. It offers a fun and entertaining experience. Discover the excitement and amusement it provides with its action-adventure gameplay. Cobot-Man will face bosses of different kind during the adventure.

title: Outscratched Demo
description: The scratchcard roguelike deckbuilder. Assemble a unique selection of scratchcards, blessed charms, and magical stickers. Discover endless exciting combos to beat the odds against a diabolical lottery.

title: Stickplosion Demo
description: Try Stickplosion free — a fast, chaotic 2D pixel-art brawler where every wall and floor is destructible. This demo is single-player: battle tunable bots across multiple modes, draft roguelite power-ups, and carve up the arena. Play up to 1 hour, then grab the full game.

title: Anatolian Horror Stories Demo
description: Anatolian Horror Stories:Curse in Bayramdere is a third-person survival horror game that puts you in the shoes of an ordinary young woman facing an unknown evil.No special skills.Just the desperate need to find out what happened to the people she loves and the will to survive long enough to do it.

title: Whispers of the Requiem Demo
description: Step into the mind of a disgraced ex-cop, once a servant of a powerful cult that controls society from the shadows. Now hunted, betrayed, and haunted by sins too dark to name, you must hide the truth before it devours you.

title: The End of the World Club Demo
description: A cute coming-of-age boys' love (BL/yaoi) visual novel set in 2012 about a group of high school students who start a club to prepare for the end of the world.

title: HAECHE_Ism_Demo
description: In the demo, you'll slash, pierce, and parry your way through swarms of infected machines across an 8-directional grid

title: Howl Of Heavens Demo
description: Game demo for demonstrating mechanics and gameplay.

title: Harlequinade Demo
description: Harlequinade is a horror otome romance visual novel about a never-ending carnival and a very death-prone college student. With the aid of 2 clowns, can you escape this timeloop?

title: Coiled Silence Demo
description: Coiled Silence is a psychological horror demo about a night shift that starts ordinary and turns wrong. Work the restaurant, manage orders from your phone, and survive the atmosphere as messages and details stop lining up.

title: BURI Demo
description: A story-driven choice-based game where every decision shapes the outcome. Follow Pluem, a boy facing pressure, family expectations, and bullying, with multiple endings determined by your choices.

title: War of the Austrian Succession Demo
Cold Trigger Demo
description: Dive into Cold Trigger, a thrilling third-person shooter (TPS) that puts you in the center of fast-paced, action-packed battles.

title: Monologin Demo
description: Short demo of Monologin, focused on atmosphere and insecurity... Work the night shift, log into a dying MMORPG, and wait for the White Unicorn event while old friends pass through the store.

title: Cornered Cadavers Demo
description: A survival horror game with fixed camera and pre rendered backgrounds. Explore a house filled with abominable monsters capable of opening doors and chasing you through every room! To make things even more difficult, your time and number of saves are very limited (depending on the difficulty level).

title: Querent Demo
description: Rally the small town of Sunset Junction to survive hypnotic creatures in a post-apocalyptic desert landscape. Boost skills by building a deck for each of your characters. Use mesmerism to solve puzzles and build relationships with the people you meet. Play your cards right and you might survive!

title: Tales of the Trade Demo
description: Run your own medieval shop in a fantasy world. Manage your stock, deal with strange customers and magical items. And try to pay off a debt of 99,999,999,980 gold left by your grandfather. One deal at a time.

title: Floyd's Cafe Demo
description: Floyd's Cafe is an upcoming cute cozy cat cafe game where you can make anything from black tea to Moka pot coffee or even just use a coffee machine. Decorate the Cafe to perfection with flowers, shelfs, and even cacti.

title: 斗牌苍穹 Demo
description: "Duel Mahjong" is an online multiplayer mahjong game incorporating item cards and superpowers. During matches, there are many ways to acquire item cards. By combining various card effects, you can devise winning strategies, enjoy a thrilling game of Mahjong with your friends!

title: Don't Block My Ads! Demo
description: At the head of your own advertising agency, generate maximum conversions! Customize your campaigns, leverage social media, and master the latest trends to attract more and more clients and build a true commercial empire. Will you be able to seize every opportunity?

title: Forbidden Love Demo
description: Love for forbidden dreams, Forbidden Love is a visual novel about the love between a teacher and a student, in pursuit of a forbidden dream.

title: Survivor's Notes Demo
description: "Survivor's Notes" is an FMV . Players control two protagonists, using choices and QTEs to unlock diverse story branches and endings. When a doomsday-dreaming civilian meets an apocalypse survivor, time, memory and fate intertwine. They seek truth in a crumbling city, closing in on a buried answer.

title: Roll to Riches Demo
description: Gather, Build and Advance your settlement with every roll in the incremental city builder Roll to Riches. Mine iron, gather wood and cut stone to make your settlement prosper. Trade with merchants every minute and transform your small camp into a wealthy Norse empire.

title: S.I.F: The Missing Rescue Demo
description: S.I.F: The Missing Rescue is a 1-4 player cooperative horror game set in a U.S. national park. Someone has gone missing. Your team is going in. A maze-like forest. Something watching your team. But the missing person is still in there. Walk toward the danger. That’s the job.

title: 7 Millimeters Demo
description: Start your journey as a carpenter in a new neighborhood. Take measurements, install furniture and fulfill customer orders. But success attracts trouble; a local gang demands a fee. Refuse, turn your shop into a fortress, and arm yourself to defend your life. will you pay or resist?

title: Traders Life Together Demo
description: Start your supermarket business and make your own trading Journey! With Co-op support Play solo or team up with friends, featuring over 300 items you can make your dream store, enjoy it with your friends!

title: 랩틸리언을 국회로! Demo
description: Become a Reptilian and Seize the Presidency! Play as a presidential aide and guide the Reptilian Kim Yong-baem all the way to the top. Train presidential qualities by day and solve intelligence puzzles by night to outmaneuver human candidates one by one.

title: Zombie Survival Demo
description: The theme is literally zombie survival. No Humans Allowed, except as the main course. An apocalyptic city building survival game where you grow the zombie horde and take over the world.

title: ShuriStellaDemo
description: To the Starry Hills, to stop the world's collapse— ShuriStella is a 3D action game with a warm, anime art style. Play as Shuri, a shrine maiden of the Sky People, and use mystical maiden powers to stand against formidable monsters while dodging their fierce attacks!

title: For My Darling Demo
description: Based on a True Story, "For My Darling" is NOT fiction! Lili’s ordinary life was fractured in 2023 after meeting someone strangely familiar. Her reality twists as something begins to follow her. It is tied to lost memories and a past that won’t stay buried. To understand, she must uncover the truth.

title: The Transylvania Adventure of Simon Quest Demo
Pentabit Copy-X Demo
description: Use the latest advanced software from the 90s to copy your data! Place your data so it is not defragmented and save it. Beware of glitches, outages and interrupt requests (IRQs) that can corrupt and make you lose your precious data.Pentabit Copy-X is a puzzle game with roguelike elements. Each run has 12 tracks and a final event to clear.

title: Rabbits Hunt Demo
description: “A perfectly balanced scare” that lets anyone get great reactions. A debut short horror game created by a streamer, designed for beginners and those who aren’t good with horror.

title: The Crown of The Vermillion Devil Demo
description: The Emperor's bounty has led you to a dying island where the locals are going strange and something older than memory is watching. A dark fantasy narrative RPG built on dialogue, dread, and consequences.

title: Call the Cat Demo
description: Play with adorable cats through a variety of mini-games, build your bond over time, and earn points to unlock new outfits.

title: Promo Wrestling World: World Editor Demo
description: Create your custom wrestling world before launch with the official World Editor Demo. Build workers, promotions, titles, and media, then export your world file and import it into Promo Wrestling World at Early Access launch.

title: Defense Of Legends Demo
description: A tower defense game where you upgrade characters and buy items for them.

title: The Pharm Sim Demo
description: Manage your own pharmacy in this first-person simulation game. Serve customers, stock shelves, process prescriptions, handle daily operations, and build a successful healthcare business.

title: Dreamscape Demo
description: An absurd, dreamy puzzle game about navigating anxieties for the future.
developer: António Reis, Mushroom Kosztolányi, kimyalastname (Kimya Taheri), botguest (James Jingxing Keing-hang Xu)

title: Dance With Time Demo
description: Dance With Time is a puzzle game about manipulating time through your movements. Change the map with your movements, create anomalies, and reach the exit.

title: SHALTER-03 Demo
description: Time is ticking. In this first-person puzzle-adventure game, every level introduces completely new mechanics. Think fast, balance buffs and debuffs, and find the most efficient path to victory. Adaptability is your greatest weapon.

title: Driftscape: Void Demo
description: Pilot a momentum-driven ship through the cooled remains of dead star systems. Master a growing arsenal, take on 10+ unique epic bosses, and tackle two sectors (demo) your way. The world is seed-generated — build and share your own in the free level editor.

title: 电气战忍录-YOGENKYO Demo
description: Here’s your chance to become a young ninja of the Beasts Ninja Squad 4! Roam the stunning hand-drawn 2D bustling metropolis glowing with endless neon hues. Step forth fearlessly to battle vicious yokai gangs, and swear to defend peace and serenity across the city called YOGENKYO!

title: 城郊主理人从街角小店到区域价格卡特尔实现供应链托拉斯 DEMO
description: Suburban Manager is a hardcore supermarket sim based on Chinese business logic. Scout locations in a 3D sandbox and build a gridless store. Procure goods via App, manage logistics, and handle realistic payrolls including net salary and social security. Experience a pure retail journey.

title: Emotion Hunter Demo
description: A 2D hand-crafted anime-style side-scrolling melee action game created by a solo developer. Dive into the mysterious unconscious minds to hunt down negative emotion monsters! Master precise combat mechanics, challenge multiple difficulties, and find your perfect combat rhythm.

title: Crescent Creek Survival Demo
description: Crescent Creek: Survival Demo plunges you into a desolate farm, cut off from civilization and steeped in mystery. As you explore its winding corridors and ominous rooms, you’ll need to make critical choices, as each path could lead to salvation or peril.

title: Rashin Detective Chronicles CASE01： The Final Page Demo
Granblue Fantasy: Relink - Endless Ragnarok Demo
description: Granblue Fantasy: Relink - Endless Ragnarok Demo Content The following three modes are playable in the demo version of Granblue Fantasy: Relink - Endless Ragnarok. 1. Story Mode 2. Quest Mode 3. Tutorial Mode

title: Magma Karta Demo
description: Magma Karta is a satisfying strategy card game with roguelite and gambling elements. The rules can switch at any turn, challenging you to adapt your builds and your playstyle.

title: Cotimero Demo
description: A new adventure awaits, so how can you hold back your steps? Choose the character you love, and claim the treasures guarded by fierce monsters. Every keystroke you make brings new hope and turning points to the world of Cotimero. Step into this world and write an eternal legend of adventure.

title: World Order: Global Power Demo
description: Rule any nation in one of the most detailed geopolitical simulations ever created. Balance economics, diplomacy, military strategy, public opinion, and global power as you guide your country through an ever-changing world shaped by your decisions.

title: Tetrabeasts Demo
description: Command a warband of monsters in Tetrabeasts,the explosive fusion of classic falling-block puzzles and tactical combat. Form deadly battle lines, clear rows to unleash devastating attacks on enemy castles, and survive relentless counterstrikes. Forge your army. Master the blocks. Conquer the realms.

title: Captain Corgi: Planetary Problem Solver Demo
ALONE: Mnemophobia Demo
description: Play the prologue of ALONE: Mnemophobia. Face "The Presence" in a disturbing interrogation, survive the darkness that drains your sanity, and solve macabre puzzles in this psychological horror demo with a gritty VHS aesthetic.

title: Eternal Decay Souls Demo
description: Explore a dark world filled with cursed creatures, solve ancient puzzles, and confront powerful bosses on a journey where each relic discovered reveals the secrets of eternal decay.

title: Mechanical Defense Line Demo
description: This is a tower defense, card-based roguelike game. Build and modify your turrets, equip gear to challenge levels and experience the story. Strengthen yourself via various functions, choose talents in battles to win. Get no less than 10 pieces of equipment in every fight.More content awaits in-game

title: Waste Runner: Critical Waste Demo
description: Step into the role of a city garbage collector and face the hidden dangers lurking in the streets. Viewed from a top-down, isometric perspective, the game challenges you to collect, transport, and safely dispose of waste across multiple urban neighbourhoods.

title: Neon Shifter Demo
description: An arcade racer infused with roguelite elements, fuelled by music, mayhem, and pure forward momentum.NEON SHIFTER pulls you into a high-speed, audio-driven road trip, where every move or crash can power your engine and build your advantage.
developer: Kittens in Timespace, Jelly Penguin Productions

title: Not My Son Demo
description: A psychological horror game where a stepfather is left alone with a disturbing child. Explore a quiet house, face growing nightmares, and piece together the truth behind the boy’s behavior.

title: Void Signal Demo
description: An immersive sci-fi space shooter where you pilot a ship through an anomalously expanding region of space. Analyze real-time scientific data, survive encounters with mysterious alien entities, make ethical decisions, and uncover hidden truths as the universe around you transforms.

title: Blades of Four Demo
description: A fast-paced fantasy action roguelike where 4 unique heroes battle through dangerous maps, unlock powerful items, and master devastating abilities with swords and bows

title: Potions & Passions: Therapist for Monsters Demo
description: Manage your spooky potion shop and meet monsters! Solve the tragicomic problems of vampires, werewolves, ifrits and trolls, or pit them against each other. Scavenge ingredients, craft volatile brews, and enjoy this chaotic management simulation!

title: Gridfire Demo
description: A top-down shooter with action packed PvP combat.  In the full game, engage in FFA or team based combat with game modes like capture the flag, control points, or team deathmatch.  In this demo, you can play CTF to to get a taste of Gridfire. If you enjoy it, please give the full game a try.

title: Mall Simulator Together Demo (Single Player)
description: Manage your own shopping mall, open new stores, organize deliveries, hire employees, and keep customers happy. This single-player demo offers a first look at the core mechanics of the full mall management experience.

title: DiceVenture Dungeon Demo
description: DiceVenture Dungeon is a roguelike dice-building dungeon crawler. Plan routes on a node map, roll and reroll dice in tactical combat, combine elements to trigger skills, and collect relics and traits. Dice challenges gate the best exploration rewards—every run builds differently.

title: A Good Deed On Harris Avenue Demo
Brazzante Demo
description: Featuring a unique doodle aesthetic, this world is entirely hand-drawn. Your goal? Use classic 'Rock, Paper, Scissors' mechanics to survive never-ending rounds.

title: The Lost Within Demo
description: A paranormal investigator enters an ancient forest shrouded in rumors of a mad woman. In this first-person horror, players explore dark thickets for clues and hidden evidence. Solving atmospheric puzzles reveals the truth as the boundary between sanity and madness collapses.

title: Not Quite Dead: Open World Survival Demo
description: Open world zombie survival Coop game with base building, looting, crafting, vehicles, and exploration.
